nasb.text: Joseph said to his brothers and to his father’s household, “I will go up and tell Pharaoh, and will say to him, ‘My brothers and my father’s household, who were in the land of Canaan, have come to me;

esv.text: Joseph said to his brothers and to his father’s household, “I will go up and tell Pharaoh and will say to him, ‘My brothers and my father’s household, who were in the land of Canaan, have come to me.

cnv.text: 約瑟對他的兄弟們和他的父家說：“我要上去告訴法老，對他說：‘我在迦南地的兄弟們和我的父家，都到我這裡來了。

ccb.text: 约瑟对他的弟兄们和其他家人说：“我要去告诉法老，你们已经从迦南来到我这里。

csbs.text: 约瑟对他的兄弟们和他父亲的全家说：“我要上到法老那里禀告说：‘我在迦南地的兄弟们和我父亲的全家都来到了我这里。
